data.name: AlignDescAuto
data.value: Automatic detection of the comet nucleus.

data.name: AlignDescGuided
data.value: Indicate the nucleus on the first and last image.

data.name: AlignDescManual
data.value: Inspect and manually set the center for each image.

data.name: AlignCropCommonTooltip
data.value: If active, crops the final image to the area common to all frames, removing black edges while maintaining the center and proportions.

data.name: AlignResultsDescStars
data.value: The point indicates the center calculated based on the star field. Move it to correct the alignment of the entire image.

data.name: AlignResultsDescComet
data.value: The point indicates the detected comet nucleus. Move it to correct the centering.

data.name: StatusWcsVerified
data.value: WCS verified on the whole sequence.

data.name: StatusJplValid
data.value: JPL/WCS data valid for all files.

data.name: StatusDataMissing
data.value: Data missing in {0} images out of {1}. Resolve (Plate Solve) before proceeding.

data.name: CropModeDesc
data.value: How the crop center is applied.

data.name: CropModeStaticTooltip
data.value: Use the same center for all images.

data.name: CropModeDynamicTooltip
data.value: Define a different center for each image.

data.name: CropClickHint
data.value: Click on the image to define the center

data.name: TooltipCenterInterest
data.value: Center area of interest in the image

data.name: StatusReadyCenterInit
data.value: Ready. Center initialized to frame middle.

data.name: StatusCenterGeometricInit
data.value: Center set to the geometric center of the image.

data.name: CropStaticInstructions
data.value: Click on the image to define the center (same for all).

data.name: CropDynamicInstructions
data.value: Click on EVERY image to define the specific center.

data.name: EnhanceDescLarsonStd
data.value: Classic subtractive method. Rotates the image by a small angle and subtracts it from the original. Ideal for highlighting sharp edges and spiral (pinwheel) structures in coma jets.

data.name: EnhanceDescLarsonSym
data.value: Evolution of the standard method that sums a positive and a negative rotation. Drastically reduces dark artifacts ('holes') typical of the standard method, better preserving natural contrast.

data.name: EnhanceDescRvsf
data.value: Radial Variable Slope Filter (RVSF). Modifies filtering intensity based on distance from the nucleus. Optimized to follow the natural brightness decay of the comet.

data.name: EnhanceDescMosaic
data.value: Generates a 4x2 mosaic applying RVSF with different parameter combinations simultaneously. Useful for quickly comparing different filter intensities to find the optimal one.

data.name: EnhanceDescInvRho
data.value: Pure geometric filter. Compensates for the natural light fall-off (1/radius) typical of comets. Flattens the strong central glare, allowing for the visualization of faint outer dust details.

data.name: EnhanceDescRwm
data.value: Radial Weighted Model (R.W.M.). Subtracts the sky background and multiplies each pixel by its distance from the center. Similar to Inverse Rho but often offers better contrast in peripheral areas.

data.name: EnhanceDescMcm
data.value: Median Coma Model (M.C.M.). Builds a synthetic model of the comet by analyzing the median of concentric rings and subtracts it. The most robust method for isolating jets and shells without creating geometric artifacts.

data.name: EnhanceDescAziAvg
data.value: Calculates the average brightness of each concentric ring and divides the image by this model. Removes perfect radial symmetry, leaving only asymmetries (jets, tails) visible.

data.name: EnhanceDescAziMed
data.value: Similar to azimuthal average but uses the median. Much more effective in handling dense star fields, preventing stars from influencing the background model calculation.

data.name: EnhanceDescAziRenorm
data.value: Normalizes local contrast ring by ring. Instead of showing absolute brightness, it shows how "anomalous" a detail is compared to its neighbors on the same radius. Extremely powerful for elusive details.

data.name: EnhanceDescFrangi
data.value: Curvature-based analysis (Hessian). Designed to identify tubular or filamentous structures. Excellent for isolating thin jets and ionic tails while ignoring point-like stars.

data.name: EnhanceDescCoherence
data.value: Analyzes local flow coherence. Highlights regions where texture follows a precise direction (like gas flows and tails), suppressing chaotic background noise.

data.name: EnhanceDescWhiteTopHat
data.value: Morphological filter that extracts bright details smaller than the specified kernel size, completely removing the low-frequency background gradient.

data.name: EnhanceDescAdaptiveLaplace
data.value: Calculates the second derivative of the image to isolate fine variations (edges) by removing gradual gradients. Uses a preliminary 'Symmetric Nearest Neighbor' smoothing to reduce noise without blurring structure edges.

data.name: EnhanceDescUnsharp
data.value: Unsharp masking technique that uses a median to blur the background. Subtracts low frequencies to drastically increase the sharpness of edges and fine structures.

data.name: EnhanceDescClahe
data.value: Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE). Maximizes local contrast by working on small sections of the image. Useful for visualizing details in both the bright nucleus and the dark tail.

data.name: EnhanceDescZScore
data.value: Local statistical normalization (Local Z-Score). Recalculates each pixel based on the mean and standard deviation of neighbors. Ideal scientific method for maximizing visibility of structures hidden in noise.

data.name: EnhanceDescDefault
data.value: Select a mode to display the description and parameters.

data.name: HeaderSessionInfo
data.value: Changes applied to the session only. Save the file to make them permanent.

data.name: HealthTooltipTime
data.value: Checks DATE-OBS or DATE keys. Indicates the exact moment of acquisition (UT), essential for calculating sidereal time and ephemeris.

data.name: HealthTooltipLocation
data.value: Checks geographic coordinates (SITELAT/LONG). Necessary for parallax correction and calculating local coordinates (Alt/Az).

data.name: HealthTooltipOptics
data.value: Checks FOCALLEN and PIXSIZE. These data define the image scale (arcsec/pixel), a critical parameter for any astrometric analysis.

data.name: HealthTooltipPointers
data.value: Checks RA/DEC coordinates sent by the mount. They act as hints to drastically speed up Plate Solving.

data.name: HealthTooltipAstrometry
data.value: Checks for a valid WCS solution (CRVAL/CD Matrix). Indicates if the image has already been correctly mapped onto the celestial sphere.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceAngularQuality
data.value: Number of angular sectors used to calculate the median.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceMaskRadius
data.value: Maximum application radius of the filter. 0 = Full image.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceSigmaRejection
data.value: Statistical threshold to exclude stars during calculation.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceNormScale
data.value: Multiplicative factor for contrast after renormalization.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceParamA
data.value: Radial offset. Moves the start of the effect away from the nucleus.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceParamN
data.value: Exponent of the function. Values > 1 concentrate the effect outside, < 1 inside.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceLogScale
data.value: Apply filter in logarithmic space. Recommended for high dynamic range images.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceIntervalA
data.value: Minimum and Maximum value for Parameter A

data.name: TooltipEnhanceIntervalB
data.value: Minimum and Maximum value for Parameter B

data.name: TooltipEnhanceIntervalN
data.value: Minimum and Maximum value for Parameter N

data.name: TooltipEnhanceSigmaScale
data.value: Scale of structures to detect. Increase to detect thicker jets.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceBetaShape
data.value: Shape sensitivity. Low values select only very thin lines, high values include blobs.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceSigmaGradient
data.value: Gaussian smoothing applied before gradient calculation.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceRhoIntegration
data.value: Integration window to calculate local directional coherence.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceTopHatKernel
data.value: Structuring element size. Structures larger than this value will be removed.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceClipLimit
data.value: Maximum contrast amplification threshold. High values increase detail but also noise.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceClaheGrid
data.value: Local grid size for histogram calculation.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceLocalStatsWindow
data.value: Local area size for mean and standard deviation calculation.

data.name: TooltipEnhanceKernelSize
data.value: Filter size (e.g., median for Unsharp Masking).

data.name: ImportTooltipSeparateNodes
data.value: If active, creates an independent node for each image instead of grouping them in a sequence.

data.name: ImportSeparateNodesDesc
data.value: Useful for individually analyzing mosaic file extensions or independent images.

data.name: PlateDesc
data.value: Analyzes the star arrangement to calculate real celestial coordinates (WCS).

data.name: PlateWarningBody
data.value: save results to make header changes permanent.

data.name: PosterizationLevelsDesc
data.value: Divides the image into discrete tones to isolate isophotes.

data.name: PosterizationMethodDesc
data.value: Choose how to distribute tones to emphasize faint details.

data.name: StarMaskDesc
data.value: Define parameters and calculate the preview.

data.name: TooltipMinDiameter
data.value: Ignore stars/noise smaller than this diameter.

data.name: VideoExportWarning
data.value: * Thresholds adjusted in the preview will be applied to the entire exported sequence.

data.name: VideoExportStatusFinalizing
data.value: Finalizing and writing indices... Do not close.

data.name: PlateErrorNoImages
data.value: Cannot perform plate solving: FITS file contains no images.

data.name: SettingsAstapInvalidFolder
data.value: The selected folder does not contain the ASTAP executable (astap_cli or astap). Please select the correct installation folder.

data.name: PlateErrorExeNotFound
data.value: ASTAP executable not found in the configured folder. Please check your settings.
